title: MINGPINHUIUS Dog Cat Food Storage Container - Transparent Sealed Insect-proof Moisture-proof Pet Food Storage Container, Portable Small Dog Food Container for Dry Food & Dry Feed (Green, M/2L)
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: 【Double Sealing Protection】Pet food storage containers are ideal for storing dry pet food. Dog food storage container with airtight seals and seal buckles keep out moisture, avoiding the deterioration of the built-in food. Full-path sealing strip design of the cover, good sealing effect

【Multiple Sizes & Versatile】Our cat food storage containers have a capacity of 2L and 2.8L，which can hold approximately 2lbs and 2.8lbs of pet food respectively due to different densities of different food. BPA free plastic, suitable for storage cereal, grain, pet food, flour, snack, dog food, cat food, rice, flour, and more. Dog food storage container keeps your food dry & safe from insects, rats or other pests

【Durable & Convenient】Upgraded Thickened dog cat food storage container is durable and not easy to be damaged. Funnel opening design makes easy to pour the food from the spout. Portable pet food storage containers are very easy to take. Dog food storage container with easy-open latch design makes both labor-saving and convenient. The size is moderate, does not take up space, it is super convenient to store in the cabinet

【Unique Scale for Easy Measurement】Pet food storage box comes with scaled barrel body, and matched with scaled measuring cup and pour spout, which measures the food more exactly and do not waste. Transparent body and clear measure scaled , more clear to see the food and convenient to fill the food when need

【Wide Application】Food storage containers are not only perfect for storing pet dry food, but also for storing rice, nuts, beans, sugar, snacks, seeds, cereal, tea, flour and many other dry food to keep them fresh and dry for long time
